My cats started drinking from it right away
The wireless feature is great - no cords for them to chew on

The stainless steel tray is a big plus

Sturdy enough to withstand dogs bumping into it

unmet_needs: Reliable long-term pump performance (3+ competitor products fail within 2-4 months)
Truly safe/non-toxic materials - several competitors have fire/shock/plastic concerns despite 'stainless steel' marketing
Easy filter replacement availability and affordability - filter ecosystem is broken for most brands
